title: Nuage Vapour Wax Melts - Breathe Easy | Contains Menthol & Eucalyptol
features: MENTHOL & EUCALYPTOL: These wax melts are packed with menthol and eucalyptol, known for their soothing properties. When lit, they release invigorating scents that fill the senses, making it perfect for those self-care moments. Enjoy the refreshing aroma, allowing you to relax and breathe easy.

CONVENIENT WAX MELTS: Each pack contains six high-quality wax melts, providing great value. Just break off one or two pieces and enjoy the long-lasting scent that fills your home. Perfect for any occasion, from cozy nights in to festive gatherings, these melts ensure that every space is aromatic and welcoming.

IDEAL FOR AUTUMN: Embrace the comforting scents of autumn with these strong-scented melts. As the leaves fall and temperatures drop, these wax melts create a warm, inviting atmosphere, perfect for snuggling up with loved ones. The blend of menthol and eucalyptol mimics the fresh air of a crisp autumn day.

AROMATIC WAX MELTS: These melts not only make your home smell delightful but also help you de-stress. Breathe in deeply and experience this soothing scent, whether you’re feeling under the weather or just need a little boost.

EASY TO USE WITH WAX MELT BURNERS: Simply place a wax melt on your ceramic burner or electric unit, light a tealight, and let the soothing vapours do their magic. No complicated setups or tools required—just a simple, effective way to enhance your home’s ambience.

PERFECT FOR SELF-CARE RITUALS: Incorporate these wax melts into your self-care routine. After a long day, light a candle and melt to create a peaceful environment for relaxation or meditation. The calming scents help wash away stress, making it easier to unwind and enjoy the moment.

VERSATILE AIR FRESHENER: Transform any room in your home into a fragrant retreat with these wax melts. From the bathroom to the living room, their strong scent will freshen the air, making any space feel more inviting. Say goodbye to stale odours and hello to a vibrant, lively atmosphere!

LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE: With each melt providing hours of enchanting scent, these wax melts are an economical choice for maintaining a pleasant environment. Light one melt and enjoy the lasting aroma that keeps your home feeling fresh and inviting, day after day.

PERFECT FOR GIFT GIVING: Looking for a thoughtful gift? These Nuage wax melts make an excellent choice for birthdays, holidays, or just because! Share the joy of relaxation and comfort with friends and family, giving them a little slice of serenity to enjoy at home.

STRESS RELIEF FOR ANY OCCASION: Whether hosting a gathering or enjoying a quiet night in, these wax melts create the perfect mood. They help relieve the stress of everyday life, turning any occasion into a celebration of comfort and tranquility. Perfect for anyone needing a little extra care during those winter months.
description: Product Description Discover the magic of Nuage Vapour Wax Melts, designed to transform your space into a soothing haven of comfort. Each pack contains six delightful wax melts infused with invigorating menthol and refreshing eucalyptol, perfect for anyone needing a little relaxation. Ideal for those chilly autumn evenings when you're feeling run down, these strong-scented wax melts help you to unwind. Simply place a piece on your favourite wax melt burner, light a tealight, and let the calming aromas fill the air, creating a warm, inviting atmosphere. Imagine curling up with a good book as the gentle scent wafts through the room, turning your home into a fragrant sanctuary. Just sit back, relax and enjoy! Safety Warning Candles can cause fires. Remove all packaging and labels before lighting. Contains Eucalyptol. May cause an allergic skin reaction. Read label before use. Wash hands thoroughly after handling.
